title: PV Sindhu Beats World No 4 Chen Yufei to Reach Japan Open Final
indian_angle: India's top female shuttler PV Sindhu secured a spot in the Japan Open final, marking a significant return to form.
summary: PV Sindhu advanced to the Japan Open final after her opponent, World No 4 Chen Yufei, retired during their semifinal match, ending a two-year final drought.

title: Gopichand: PV Sindhu A Definite Threat For World Championships, LA 2028
indian_angle: National coach Pullela Gopichand's assessment highlights PV Sindhu's potential to bring more glory to India at major upcoming tournaments.
summary: National coach Pullela Gopichand believes PV Sindhu's recent form makes her a strong contender for the upcoming World Championships and the LA 2028 Olympics.

title: BAI Addresses Venue Concerns For World Championships in Delhi
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India has confirmed that issues like bird droppings and monkeys at the Indira Gandhi Indoor Stadium have been resolved for the upcoming World Championships in Delhi.
summary: BAI General Secretary Mishra stated that measures have been implemented to prevent issues like bird droppings and monkeys at the Indira Gandhi Indoor Stadium, ensuring a smooth BWF World Championships 2026 in Delhi.

title: BAI Releases Eligibility Criteria for World Junior Championships 2026 Selection
indian_angle: The Badminton Association of India has issued crucial guidelines for the selection of Indian players for the BWF World Junior Championships in Cairo.
summary: BAI has published the eligibility criteria for players aspiring to represent India at the BWF World Junior Championships 2026 in Cairo, Egypt.

title: BAI Implements 3x15 Scoring System for Junior Domestic Tournaments
indian_angle: This new scoring system will be implemented across India's domestic ranking tournaments and national championships for junior age groups (U-13, U-15, U-17), impacting player development.
summary: The Badminton Association of India has announced the implementation of the 3x15 scoring system for all domestic ranking tournaments and national championships in the U-13, U-15, and U-17 age categories.
